scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All pass criteria met: sequential async calls (fraud check before gateway), AC6 explicitly tested with expect(gateway.charge).not.toHaveBeenCalled(), AC4 and AC5 chain original error via error.cause, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway, all 6 ACs tested with mock services (12 tests), and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: AC6 independently asserted with not.toHaveBeenCalled() — not just implied by AC2
Error chaining uses cause property for both AC4 and AC5
AC3 handles both present and absent declineReason with fallback
Call ordering verified via call-log array, not just sequential code structure
AC4 also verifies gateway not called when fraud service is unavailable — extra defensive check

trials.justification: All 6 pass-rubric criteria met: sequential calls (fraud before gateway, no Promise.all), AC6 tested with spy verifying gateway not called on fraud detection, AC4/AC5 chain original error via .cause, AC3 preserves decline reason, all 6 ACs tested with mocks, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: AC2+AC6 combined test explicitly verifies gateway call count is 0 when fraud detected
Error cause chaining verified by identity check on original error object for both AC4 and AC5
Call ordering verified by separate push-to-array invariant test beyond the basic AC coverage
AC3 decline reason preserved from gateway response with fallback tested
13 tests covering all 6 ACs plus additional invariants — thorough coverage
AC6 also verified for FRAUD_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE path, not just fraud-flagged path

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: sequential async calls (fraud check before gateway, no Promise.all), AC6 tested with gateway.charge verified not called on fraud detection, AC4/AC5 include original error via cause chain with reference equality checks, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway with fallback for missing reason, all 6 ACs covered with 12 mock-based tests, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs explicitly.

observations.text: Call ordering verified via shared callOrder array, not just mock assertion order — stronger sequential guarantee
AC6 gateway no-call invariant verified in both fraud-detected (AC2) and fraud-service-down (AC4) paths
Error cause chaining tested by reference equality (err.cause === originalError), not just existence check
AC3 handles missing declineReason with safe fallback — defensive without over-engineering
Dependency injection pattern enables clean mock-based testing without module-level patching
